title: Uruguayan Salad with Crispy Potatoes and Fresh Flowers
description: A refreshing Uruguayan-inspired salad topped with crispy potatoes and garnished with edible flowers. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Floral
ingredients.notes: edible flowers, such as nasturtium or violas

ingredients.name: Crunchy
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or chives

instructions: Toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, roasted potatoes, and chopped herbs.
Drizzle the salad with lemon juice and toss to combine.
Garnish with edible flowers and serve immediately.
